title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: lightweight, extensible framework for running Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma & other LLMs locally on macOS, Linux and Windows with one command.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, list and delete models with async support.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, Chat and Embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (formerly Ollama-WebUI): chat, multi-model, PDF upload, RAG, admin panel.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API, streaming, and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that pipes GitHub Copilot chat requests to a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal React chat app using ollama-js and Vercel AI SDK for streaming responses.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection.

title: ollama-models
summary: Community-curated Modelfile recipes for Falcon, WizardCoder, Zephyr, CodeLlama, etc.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI built with Tauri + Svelte for chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced CLI wrapper around ollama with fzf model picker, conversation history, and markdown rendering.

title: ollama-nvidia-docker
summary: Official documentation and Dockerfile for running Ollama on NVIDIA GPUs with CUDA.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Simple RAG pipeline combining Ollama embeddings, Chroma vector DB and LangChain retrieval.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that answers questions using a configurable local Ollama model.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server using Bolt JS and ollama-js for private LLM queries.

title: ollama-deno
summary: Deno module exposing typed wrapper around Ollama REST endpoints with streaming support.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir OTP client for Ollama with GenServer pooling and Telemetry events.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration offering OllamaGenerator and OllamaChatGenerator components.
